occupation_title: Paper Goods Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
occupation_definition: Set up, operate, or tend paper goods machines that perform a variety of functions, such as converting, sawing, corrugating, banding, wrapping, boxing, stitching, forming, or sealing paper or paperboard sheets into products.
